title: Remaining focus behavior drift batch
implemented: Focus-specific own-sound gate to avoid duplicate generic activation sounds
Frost original ice sound volume/pitch at spawned shard source
Primal original ice sound volume/pitch at spawned orb source
Fire non-fireball fallback range corrected to 17
Equal Trade linked radius corrected to 3 + enlarge * 2
Warding original 500 ms per-position delay guard
Primal cost randomization changed to System.currentTimeMillis() / 200L window
forge_1_19_2_adapters: Minecraft 1.7.10 world event/sound calls are mapped to Level.levelEvent and TC4Sounds ResourceLocation events
Damage/projectile handling remains in the Forge 1.19.2 entity adapter layer from Stage174-178
